title: angolluma sheilae
intro: Angolluma sheilae, a succulent plant species native to the Western Ghats of India, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Asclepiadaceae family. Traditionally, Angolluma sheilae has been used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments, boasting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Angolluma sheilae include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Angolluma sheilae is often used in decoctions, infusions, and powder forms to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
